title: Simple Hammers
description: Mine faster and wider with Simple Hammers that break 3x3 areas of blocks at once.
body:
# Mine faster and wider with Simple Hammers!
This lightweight Fabric mod adds a collection of powerful hammers that break 3×3 areas of blocks at once — perfect for tunneling, strip mining, or clearing space in seconds.

## Features
- **Hammers can be crafted from several materials:** Wooden, Stone, Copper, Iron, Emerald, Diamond, and Netherite hammers
- **All hammers can mine a 3×3 area**
- **Hold Shift to mine a single block** for precision work
- Durability and sneak mining can be **configured**

## Compatibility
- Works for:
  -  **Fabric 1.20.1 and above**
  -  **Forge 1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.11, 26.1 and above**
  -  **NeoForge 1.21.1, 1.21.11, 26.1 and above**
- May conflict with Vein Miner-type mods

## Issues & Feedback
If you find any issues, report them on our [Github issues page](https://github.com/JustErikSK/SimpleHammers-Mod/issues) for this mod.

If you would like me to port the mod to other version, feel free to let me know. I don't plan to port it to versions older than 1.20.1 tho as there's already enough good mods with hammers.

![website](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f6907e86aad55d3518d34c37a13e3addb723228_0.webp)

**Check out my other projects at my [website](https://withrage.com/)!**

## ✨ Also try out our new mods - Cozy Café alongside Cozy Ingredients!
We've recently released 2 new mods that are supposed to be used together, please try them out!

**[Cozy Café - A brand new food mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cozy-cafe-mod)**

**[Cozy Ingredients - A core library mod needed for Cozy Café](https://modrinth.com/mod/cozy-ingredients-mod)**
